title: Finance Manager
description:
• Well Established Medical Devices Manufacturing Company
  • Basic $7500 - $8000 + Allowance + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location: Boon Lay
  • Working day: Monday to Friday
  • Working hours: 8.30am to 5.30pm


Job Responsibilities:

  • Assist the Group Finance Director in developing, implementing and monitoring the compliance of internal control policies and procedures.
  • Review consolidated financial statements, management reports and budget variance analysis of the Group.
  • Co-ordinate and lead the Finance Managers of subsidiaries to perform group financial activities.
  • Ensure all financial, accounting and analytical reports are prepared according to the management policies and accounting standards.
  • Coordinate, participate and deliver insights into the financial reports in the management meeting and board meeting.
  • Manage relationship with external auditors for financial audits.
  • Complete and submit all GST returns and ensure compliance.
  • Review CIT returns to be submitted by Tax Agent.
  • Lead the preparation of annual budgets, analysis and presentation to Management.
  • Oversee the costing function for the manufacturing activities in Singapore.
  • Supervision of local & overseas Accounts staff with full spectrum of accounting responsibilities.
  • Perform any other tasks as the need arises.

Job Requirements:

  • Possess minimum Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or related field with 5-8 years of working experience, including experience in manufacturing costing, and supervisory experience.
  • Prior working experience with Microsoft Business Central is beneficial.
  • Current CA/CMA membership or equivalent would be an added advantage.
  • Some travelling within Asia is required.


Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


LIONG ZHAO GUAN (R22107632)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
